title: Surface open findings in next
goal: mini context next (and /mini:next) loads open adversarial findings via listFindings and injects them into the prompt as a block of candidates for the next phase, so a proposer can promote an open finding into a fix phase.

steps.title: Render open-findings block in next prompt
steps.detail: Add openFindings to NextSessionOptions in sessionContext.ts; new '# Open adversarial findings' block listing each open finding (id · severity · where + title) with advisory text that the proposer may promote one into a fix phase; block omitted when empty. Covered by sessionContext.test.ts (present with findings, absent without).

steps.title: Wire next context to load open findings
steps.detail: buildNextContext in context.ts calls listFindings(cwd) and passes results into buildNextSessionPrompt. Covered by context.test.ts: a written findings file makes mini context next output contain the finding id+title; no findings dir leaves the block absent.

steps.title: Document findings in next docs
steps.detail: Update docs/ for the next command (and a note in findings docs) that open adversarial findings now surface as candidates in /mini:next; English per CLAUDE.md.

resolvedVerify: Remove the temporary .mini/findings/ directory before done

autoCommit.subject: Phase 157: Surface open findings in next
